data.narrative: Completed Module 6 by defining explicit interface contracts, verifying simulated parallel outputs, catching an endpoint path mismatch, and choosing a contract-preserving fix.

dimension_scores.observation: The student defined shared UUID, datetime, and error formats and enumerated API response shapes.
The student chose isolated branches for parallel agents and recognized integration checkpoints.
dimension_scores.evidence: Recorded module_06 decision reason as isolated branches to prevent in-flight collisions.

dimension_scores.observation: The student anticipated contract mismatch risk and built a break scenario to detect it.
The interface contracts were precise enough for independent agent work and included error case expectations.
dimension_scores.evidence: Documented GET /api/providers and GET /api/providers/{provider_id}/slots response schemas with error shapes.

dimension_scores.observation: The student fixed the contract violation by preserving the contract and updating the rogue agent path.
dimension_scores.evidence: Created artifacts/parallel/module-06-fix-plan.md to capture the chosen fix approach.

dimension_scores.observation: The student traced the booking flow through both agents and verified compatibility at the contract level.
dimension_scores.evidence: Simulated agent output bundle and contract artifacts for provider browse and slot APIs.

strengths: Defined clear API contracts and used a break scenario to prove contract enforcement.
growth_areas: Add automated contract validation or schema tests earlier in the workflow.
data.recommendation: Start Module 7 by converting the agreed API contracts into a shared schema or OpenAPI definition for parallel validation.

public_evidence.student_action: Documented the shared API contract for provider browsing and slot retrieval.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Shows the ability to coordinate parallel work with explicit integration boundaries.

public_evidence.student_action: Captured a contract violation scenario for parallel execution testing.
public_evidence.technical_detail: Rogue agent output using POST /api/v1/bookings instead of the agreed /api/bookings.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Demonstrates diligence in catching mismatches before merge.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Created explicit shared API contract artifacts.
Selected isolated branches and simulated parallel agent outputs.

teaching_approaches.detail: Built a break scenario to test contract adherence.
